title: Module 8: ES6+ & Modern JS
description: JavaScript ka naya aur behtar roop.

chapters.title: 1. Arrow Functions
chapters.content:
Functions likhne ka chhota tareeka.

  • const add = (a, b) => a + b;

chapters.title: 2. Destructuring
chapters.content:
Objects aur Arrays se data nikalne ka aasaan tareeka.

  • const { name } = user;

chapters.title: 3. Modules & Classes
chapters.content: Code ko alag files me todna aur OOP use karna.
